title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — GoThru Maps Frontend

issues.main_description_html:
• Hide Private & Unlisted Post

QA Tester Summary - Issue #74: Integrate Post Visibility

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-post-visibility.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com + https://panorra.com

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White panorra_route_shells reporter private/unlisted post URLs -> Panorra route shells reachable TP Verified
2 Gray hidden_payload_contains_slugs embed hidden-post payload -> includes both reporter slugs TP Verified
3 Black reported_locations_control map opened at supplied Subang locations without hidden header -> map loads TP Verified
4 Task Sprint hide_private_unlisted_posts map opened with Get-Unlisted-Private=true -> map loads and hides private/unlisted posts TP Fail

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: Panorra detail pages -> Panorra embed map at supplied locations -> hidden private/unlisted payload

Runtime result Browser/API signal Frontend outcome Review
Reporter post URLs https://panorra.com/p/<slug> route shells return 200 The supplied private/unlisted slugs are valid Panorra routes Verified
Hidden payload /embed/panorra SSR with Get-Unlisted-Private=true contains both reporter slugs Server knows the posts must be hidden Verified
Location control /embed/panorra?d=<reported-location> without hidden header renders MapLibre canvas Supplied locations can be opened on the map Verified
Hidden mode /embed/panorra with Get-Unlisted-Private=true does not render the map canvas Cannot verify hidden posts visually because hidden mode breaks the map Failed

Bug Notes

  • The reporter slugs are present in the hidden private/unlisted payload.
  • Manual/observed detail check: private post redirects to Post Unavailable; unlisted post direct URL shows Post Location : Jalan Raden Ajeng Kartini.
  • Opening the same reported locations without the hidden header loads the Panorra map.
  • Opening with Get-Unlisted-Private=true shows the browser error page instead of the MapLibre canvas.
  • Code review note: hiddenPostSlugs is applied to panorraThumbnailLayer, while category/ghost symbol layers still do not filter hidden slugs.

Evidence Captured

  • Full-desktop MP4 recording with browser address bar visible.
  • Screenshot evidence from the rerun at the reported locations.
  • Playwright trace is available locally under qa_testing/reports/artifacts/.../trace.zip.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-74-PanorraPostVisibilityBest1040VideoCleanRerun-1782303782129.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #110: Fix Map Zoom-Out Issue & Enforce Mandatory Location Field
issues.main_description_html: Users are unable to zoom out on the map when viewing photographer locations. Additionally, some users do not have location data, causing incomplete or inconsistent map results.

• Update Color To Blue Line
  • Re-Size Line

QA Tester Summary - Issue #78: Update Marker Lines

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/marker-lines.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co - route gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW - view 51.659592257311374,5.299637052478715,18

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White marker_lines_render valid blue-line tour -> map renders marker route lines TP Pass
2 Gray marker_lines_blue_linestring rendered route -> blue #6366f1 LineString is present TP Pass
3 Black marker_lines_resized_width rendered route -> visible line width is about 5px and stable after zoom TP Pass
4 Task Sprint #78 acceptance marker route -> blue line + resized line TP Pass

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.gothru.co/{moderationId} -> vector tile route data -> MapLibre line layer rendering

Marker line color Indigo/blue pixels are detected on the canvas Marker route displays as blue line Verified
Marker line geometry Vector tiles include LineString geometry Route is rendered as a line, not only dots Verified
Marker line size Canvas measurement is about 5px and stable after zoom Resized line remains visually consistent Verified
Server health HTTP responses are checked for 5xx No server-error regression expected Verified

issues.display_title: Issue #62: Implement Search Location Panorra Maps
issues.main_description_html:
• Implement Search map by address location
  • Implement Autocomplete Search location
  • Enable Search by address location from Panorra PWA
  • Enable Search by address location from Panorra Mobile

QA Tester Summary - Issue #62: Implement Search Location Panorra Maps

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-search-location.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com - query London

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White panorra_search_root_visible Panorra map root -> search input is visible TP Fail
2 Gray panorra_autocomplete_search search input + query -> autocomplete suggestions appear TP Blocked
3 Black panorra_mobile_pwa_search mobile/PWA viewport -> search input remains available TP Fail
4 Task Sprint #62 acceptance Panorra Maps/PWA/Mobile -> address search + autocomplete enabled TP Fail

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com -> Panorra map root -> global InputSearch -> autocomplete search API

Runtime result Browser/API signal Frontend outcome Review
Panorra root loads Page navigation succeeds Panorra map canvas renders Verified
Desktop/PWA search availability input[placeholder="Search"] is not visible User cannot start address search from Panorra root Failed
Autocomplete search Search input unavailable Autocomplete cannot be attempted from Panorra root Blocked
Mobile/PWA search availability mobile viewport still has no visible search input Panorra mobile/PWA address search is not enabled Failed
Server health HTTP responses are checked for 5xx No server-error regression expected Verified

Bug Notes

  • The Panorra map renders, but the global search input is hidden on maps.panorra.com.
  • Current root page code gates search with showSearch={!domain.includes('panorra') ...}, which matches the observed failure.
  • Because the search box is absent, address search and autocomplete cannot be used from Panorra PWA/Mobile.

Evidence Captured

  • Full-desktop MP4 recording with browser address bar visible.
  • Screenshot evidence from the rerun.
  • Playwright trace is available locally under qa_testing/reports/artifacts/.../trace.zip.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-62-PanorraSearchLocationBugClean1040-1782295691555.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #66: Generate Thumbnail base on LatLong
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #66: Generate Thumbnail based on LatLong

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-latlong-thumbnail.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com - slug collected from Panorra marker vector tiles near -10,25

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White thumbnail_iframe_map_canvas /thumbnail/{slug} iframe -> MapLibre canvas renders TP Pass
2 Gray iframe_ready_dimensions embedded thumbnail route -> IFRAME_READY message includes map/canvas dimensions TP Pass
3 Black map_thumbnail_generated map canvas loaded from post lat/long -> MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED emits PNG base64 TP Partial
4 Task Sprint #66 acceptance Panorra slug with lat/long -> generated map thumbnail image centered on that lat/long TP Fail

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail/{slug} -> Panorra post location -> MapLibre initial view -> canvas PNG data URL

Runtime result Browser/API signal Frontend outcome Review
Thumbnail route loads Iframe navigation succeeds /thumbnail/{slug} renders inside parent page Verified
Lat/long map render MapLibre canvas becomes visible, but openmaptiles requests stay around z14/8191/8191 Map thumbnail route paints default 0,0 area instead of candidate coordinates Failed
Iframe readiness IFRAME_READY postMessage received Parent can detect thumbnail iframe dimensions Verified
PNG generation MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED includes data:image/png;base64,... and resolution Parent receives generated PNG, but it is not centered on the post lat/long Partial
Server health HTTP responses are checked for 5xx No server-error regression expected Verified

Bug Notes

  • Candidate slug from vector tile: fcd357adb81-2024111530050402 at approximately lat=-3.9410, lng=39.7485.
  • Expected openmaptiles z14 tile near that lat/lng, but runtime requested z14 tiles around 8191/8191 and 8192/8192, which correspond to the default 0,0 area.
  • MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED fires and returns PNG base64, but the generated map thumbnail is not based on the candidate lat/long.

Evidence Captured

  • Full-desktop MP4 recording with browser address bar visible.
  • Screenshot evidence from the rerun.
  • Playwright trace is available locally under qa_testing/reports/artifacts/.../trace.zip.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-66-LatLongThumbnailBug1040-1782294065806.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #71: Implement local cache using indexdb
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #71: Implement local cache using indexdb

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/indexeddb-local-cache.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Result: Failed - confirmed bug

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White panorra_map_loads clean IndexedDB origin -> Panorra map renders TP Pass
2 Gray indexeddb_cache_database_created loaded map + markers/thumbnails -> at least one IndexedDB cache DB/store exists TP Fail
3 Black indexeddb_cache_records_persisted cache DB/store exists -> one or more records are persisted TP Blocked by gray-box failure
4 Task Sprint #71 acceptance map assets/markers -> persisted browser IndexedDB cache TP Fail

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com -> map/marker/thumbnail loading -> browser IndexedDB cache validation

Runtime result Browser/API signal Frontend outcome Review
Panorra page loads Page navigation succeeds Map page opens in Chromium headed run Verified
Map render path Map container and marker thumbnails become visible User-facing map content is displayed Verified
IndexedDB database creation indexedDB.databases() returns [] No local cache database/store exists Bug confirmed
IndexedDB record persistence No database/store available Record-count validation cannot run Blocked
HTTP 5xx handling Response-code step not reached after cache assertion failure No final 5xx review from this failing path Not completed

Bug Notes

  • The Panorra map renders, but indexedDB.databases() remains empty after markers/thumbnails have time to load.
  • This means issue #71 is not implemented as a real browser IndexedDB cache yet.
  • Code contains the dexie dependency and IndexedDB-related comments, but the tested production runtime does not create or populate an IndexedDB database.

Failure

expected the Panorra map to create at least one IndexedDB database
Expected: not []

Evidence Captured

  • Full-desktop MP4 recording with browser address bar visible.
  • Screenshot evidence from the rerun.
  • Playwright trace is available locally under qa_testing/reports/artifacts/.../trace.zip.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-71-IndexedDBCache-AddrBarMapFullFinal1040-1782288392381.mp4
